title: cyperus kyllingiella
intro: Cyperus kyllingiella, also known as Kyllinga, is a species of sedge that belongs to the family Cyperaceae. This plant is traditionally used in African folk medicine and has been found to possess medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits of Cyperus kyllingiella include the treatment of fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, as well as its use as a diuretic. Herbal preparations of Cyperus kyllingiella include infusions and decoctions, which are often used in traditional medicine to treat various ailments.
